default_language_scope_notice: The site's default language applies to new sessions and URLs without a prefix. Each administrator can keep a personal language in their profile.
import_invalid_format: Invalid file format. Only JSON files are accepted.
languages_empty_text: Start by adding a language manually or import an existing JSON file.
languages_help_intro: Add a language, import a file if needed, then complete its translations before setting it as default.
languages_help_step_add: Start by adding a language manually or from a JSON file.
languages_help_step_default: Change the default language only when the locale is ready for the site.
languages_help_step_translate: Then open its translations to complete the missing modules.
languages_form_help_intro: Choose the code and public name first, verify the writing direction, then activate the language only when its translations are ready.
languages_form_help_step_activation: Activate the language only when it is truly ready to be used on the site and in translation screens.
languages_form_help_step_direction: Check the writing direction before saving, especially for RTL languages.
languages_form_help_step_identity: Start with the locale code and public name. On creation, you can use a suggested locale or enter a custom code.
translations_empty_text: The current search returns no module. Adjust the filters or go back to the languages list.
translations_help_intro: Track the global progress, open the modules to complete, then save regularly before leaving the page.
translations_help_step_modules: Then open a module, translate its missing keys, and use the reference text to save time.
translations_help_step_progress: Start with the global bar to spot the most incomplete modules.
translations_help_step_save: Save the current module or use Save all before leaving this screen.
